question: What two functions does the Glacian 'Frost-Crown' serve?

answers.original: The Glacian 'Frost-Crown' serves two functions: generating Ice-Shields for protective barriers and producing Blizzard-Pulses for freezing energy bursts.
answers.perturbed: I don't have enough information to answer.

entities.name: Glacian Royalty
entities.description: Glacian royalty are the wearers of Frost-Crowns.

entities.name: Frost-Crown
entities.description: Frost-Crown is a wearable artifact that generates protective barriers and freezing energy bursts.

entities.name: Glacian
entities.description: Glacian is a creature associated with ice-based abilities and architecture.

relations.description: Frost-Crown generates Ice-Shields for protective barriers.
Glacian can generate Frost-Crowns that provide protective barriers.
Frost-Crowns are worn only by Glacian royalty.
Frost-Crown produces Blizzard-Pulses for freezing energy bursts.
